Description
kp.j_p_a.domain.boxes
 
  • Classes in kp.j_p_a.domain.boxes used by kp.j_p_a.domain.boxes
    Class
    Description
    Box
    The box entity class.
    CentralBox
    The central box entity class.
    If the relationship is bidirectional, the non-owning side must use the mappedBy element.
    LowerBox
    The lower box entity class.
    MultiBox
    The multi box entity class.
    SingleBox
    The single box entity class.
